prompts.prompt: Build a revenue dashboard: a KPI row with total revenue, order count, and average order value, a revenue-by-month line chart, and a revenue-by-customer-segment bar chart. Use the orders model.
Build an operations overview app: order status breakdown, payment failure rate by processor, revenue by region, and completion rate over time. Clicking a bar or slice should filter the other charts.
Build a customer explorer: a searchable table of customers with lifetime value and churn risk, export controls, and a KPI header with customer count and average lifetime value.
Build a monthly business review as a downloadable PDF report: revenue trend, order volume, payment health, and a short narrative summary per section.
Build a revenue-by-segment table with an 'Open in Google Sheets' button so the team can share the numbers in a spreadsheet.
Recreate this chart and add a companion table showing the same data.
prompts.prepend:
[Referenced saved charts — metric queries available at /tmp/metric-queries/. Read /app/references/chart-references.md before using them.]
- revenue-by-month.json ("Revenue by month", explore: orders)
